title: bowlesia setigera
intro: Bowlesia setigera, also known as the 'thimble flower', is a perennial plant native to South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bowlesia setigera include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating skin conditions like eczema. Herbal preparations of Bowlesia setigera include infusions and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
